# [Email Template] Decoupling of Lodgement and Agreement during Enhancement

: Ayush Kumar
Created time: October 7, 2024 5:44 PM
Status: Not started
Last edited: January 15, 2025 4:44 PM

# **What problem are we solving?**

—> In case of Line Enhancement, the flow is as follows: KYC—>Bank —> pledge —> Agreement

- Two separate communications through email is sent to BAJAJ through email, one after the pledge step and the other after Agreement step.
- Email format sent after the Pledge step(no change in Email format):

<aside>
💡

Hi,

Customer has pledged additional securities. Please refer to the attached file for the lodgement of the MF pledged.

LAN No. : V402ALAS00171774

Expecting confirmation with IVR file (PDF)

MF_Pledged_Portfolio.csv

</aside>

- New Email format sent after the Agreement step:
- Remove the attachment
- Template ID: d-06de18eb3ec7427c8ef38d1f81953c41

<aside>
💡

Hi,

Please refer to the below details for line enhancement.

LAN No. : V402ALAS00171774

PAN no –ARZPM7248Q

Mandate-Callback :

{

"applicationId" : "8ab5f27a-2d5f-46fc-bb94-c5f2d24baa03",

"data" : {

"account_number" : "02651000089773",

"bank_name" : "HDFC Bank",

"ref_no" : "HDFC7011109242007878",

"customer_name" : "NAVISH MAHAJAN"

},

"error" : null,

"lanNo" : "6319774471491",

"link" : null,

"status" : "Finished"

}

Agreement-Callback :

{

"acceptanceIPAddress" : null,

"acceptanceTimestamp" : null,

"applicationId" : "8ab5f27a-2d5f-46fc-bb94-c5f2d24baa03",

"link" : null,

"status" : "2409:40d1:d1:3cec:8dc0:e20e:f020:584e || 2024-09-11 11:25:12 || SUCCESS"

}

**Old Sanction Limit : xxxxx**

**Enhanced Sanction Limit : xxxxx**

</aside>

![image.png](%5BEmail%20Template%5D%20Decoupling%20of%20Lodgement%20and%20Agree/image.png)

Old Email Template sent after the Agreement step:

<aside>
💡

Hi,

Please refer to the below details for line enhancement **and attached file for lodgment of MF.**
LAN No. : V402ALAS00170137
**Expecting confirmation with IVR file (PDF)**

PAN no –AKRPB8663P
Mandate-Callback :

{
"applicationId" : "4a8ff3c7-b713-4e00-b306-d76d48c7543f",
"data" : {
"account_number" : "4711450840",
"bank_name" : "Kotak Mahindra Bank",
"ref_no" : "",
"customer_name" : "BHATT NIPUN DINBANDHU"
},
"error" : null,
"lanNo" : "6320079556521",
"link" : null,
"status" : "Finished"
}

Agreement-Callback :

{
"acceptanceIPAddress" : null,
"acceptanceTimestamp" : null,
"applicationId" : "4a8ff3c7-b713-4e00-b306-d76d48c7543f",
"link" : null,
"status" : "2401:4900:1f3e:7b71:1060:495c:e23b:5fc3 || 2024-10-07 12:08:40 || SUCCESS"
}

</aside>
